\tzpentry{ID4813}{Coupled Cymatic Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4813 introduces Coupled Cymatic Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\hat{H}_{\\text{cymatic}} = g \\sum \\hat{a}^{\\dagger} \\hat{a} \\otimes \\hat{x}_{\\text{mech}}\n\\end{equation}
